Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0B09 "PYJAMARAMA-0779-0B09" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0779 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Pyjamarama! (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added a routine at $0779 to display the loading screen and wait for any key or the fire button on either joystick to enter the game.
Before starting the game, the routine sets $4354 to $01 to default to joystick control.
Also made the following changes to allow the joystick button in port one to start the game as well as the return key:
1. Patched the JSR $531C instruction at $544B to be JSR $AC00 instead 2. Added a small routine at $AC00 to check the fire button in port 1 - if pressed, then it sets the accumlator to $12 and returns, which starts the game as if the return key is pressed. If not pressed, the routine then executes the JSR $531C instruction and returns to carry on the normal code flow. 3. Updated the message at $53D6 to reflect the fact that both return or fire can be used to start the game
